title: Stand Reservation Plan Payload
description: Canonical JSON payload for stand reservation plans (used by planJson and embedded in API submissions).

start.description: Default reservation start applied to rows that omit start.

end.description: Default reservation end applied to rows that omit end.

reservations.description: Reservation rows to import once the plan is approved.

event_start.description: Event-level default start datetime for slot reservations and rows that omit start.

event_finish.description: Event-level default end datetime for slot reservations and rows that omit end.

stand_slots.description: Stand-based slots where each stand contains one or more timed slot reservations.

dateTime.description: Date/time in either RFC 3339 format or "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS".

callsign.description: VATSIM callsign pattern used by reservation validation.

airfield.description: Arrival airfield ICAO. Use either airfield or airport.

airport.description: Alias for airfield. Use either airport or airfield.

stand.description: Stand identifier at the selected airfield.

origin.description: Optional departure airfield ICAO used for matching.

destination.description: Optional destination airfield ICAO used for matching.

start.description: Reservation-specific start time. Falls back to top-level start.

end.description: Reservation-specific end time. Falls back to top-level end.

airfield.description: Stand airfield ICAO. Use either airfield or airport.

airport.description: Alias for airfield. Use either airport or airfield.

stand.description: Stand identifier that acts as the slot container.

slot_reservations.description: Reservations assigned to this stand slot.

standSlot.description: A stand acting as a slot containing multiple timed callsign reservations.

airfield.description: Arrival airfield ICAO. Use either airfield or airport.

airport.description: Alias for airfield. Use either airport or airfield.

stand.description: Stand identifier at the selected airfield.

origin.description: Optional departure airfield ICAO used for matching.

destination.description: Optional destination airfield ICAO used for matching.

start.description: Reservation-specific start time. Falls back to top-level start.

end.description: Reservation-specific end time. Falls back to top-level end.

slotReservation.description: A reservation row nested under a stand slot. Airfield/stand may be inherited from the parent stand slot.
